title: Scheduled agents
description: Run a saved agent on a recurring interval. A minute-tick cron claims due enabled schedules (bounded, OCC-safe) and runs each through the SAME callForUser pipeline as a normal agent run (`agent/<id>` model ref). Schedules run AS their creator, spending that workspace's creds; interval floored at 15 min. CRUD is workspace-scoped ('member' to write, 'viewer' to read); only the creator or a ws admin can toggle/remove.
